title: Tower PT20087BLK 2-Slice Toaster with 6 Browning Levels, Cancel Setting, Removable Crumb Tray, 650W, Black
features: 6 BROWNING LEVELS: Make your preferred toast with 6 different browning settings for the perfect taste and texture
CANCEL SETTING: Easy to use controls allow you to cancel toasting at any time
REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY: Installed with a removable tray to catch fallen crumbs and make it easier to dispose of mess
NON-SLIP FEET: Non-slip feet keep the toast stable and secure on the worktop for added safety
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Make the perfect toast every time with Tower Enjoy your toast, crumpets and bagels exactly how you like them with the Tower 2-slice toaster. Featuring 6 browning settings, it gives you more control over the toasting time so you can select the right texture to suit your taste. The cancel option allows you to stop the toaster at your convenience. The removeable tray makes it easy to dispose of excess crumbs to keep your countertop clean, with integrated cord storage to keep your surface neat and free from wires. Powerful toaster features 6 browning settings so you can enjoy your toast with the right consistency and texture Cancel function lets you stop toasting at any time Removable crumb tray is easy-to-empty, ensuring your surfaces are kept tidy A cool touch handle protects you from burns A simple wipe with a damp cloth is all that is required to keep the toaster clean CANCEL SETTING Allows you to cancel toasting at any time 6 BROWING LEVELS 6 adjustable browning levels for varied results on toast, bagels and crumpets REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY Removable crumb tray for less mess

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti-Slip Base, Cancel Function, LED Indicator, Removable Crumb Tray, Variable Browning Control
